entity.summary: BNB Chain-rooted hybrid crypto derivatives platform that combines CEX-like and decentralized trading products and now operates across multiple chains.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0099 and hei_unadded_0100 as one entity. Country assignment is intentionally avoided: official ApolloX materials identify a multichain protocol with BNB Chain support, so HEI records an ecosystem origin rather than an unsupported legal domicile.

events.title: ApolloX recorded as hybrid exchange/protocol entity
events.description: ApolloX is recorded as one BNB Chain-rooted hybrid exchange/protocol entity consolidating ApolloX and ApolloX DEX candidate rows while reflecting its later multichain trading identity.
events.notes: Replace with a precise launch, incident, or migration event if stronger dated sources are added.

evidence.title: ApolloX official multichain exchange website
evidence.notes: Official ApolloX page identifies BNB Chain in its supported-network and token ecosystem while describing the platform as multichain. This supports the BNB Chain ecosystem origin label without asserting a legal country domicile.

evidence.title: ApolloX support / official information center
evidence.notes: Official support/help center used as additional identity evidence.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika references for ApolloX / ApolloX DEX
evidence.notes: Backlog rows hei_unadded_0099 and hei_unadded_0100 referred to ApolloX / ApolloX DEX.
